title: Characterisation of nilpotent-by-finite groups
journal: Bulletin of the Australian Mathematical Society
abstract: LetGbe a finitely generated soluble group. The main result of this note is to prove thatGis nilpotent-by-finite if, and only if, for every pairX,Yof infinite subsets ofG, there exist anxinX,yinYand two positive integersm=m(x,y),n=n(x,y) satisfying [x,nym] = 1. We prove also that ifGis infinite and ifmis a positive integer, thenGis nilpotent-by-(finite of exponent dividingm) if, and only if, for every pairX,Yof infinite subsets ofG, there exist anxinX,yinYand a positive integern=n(x,y) satisfying [x,nym] = 1.
